option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">SISPTMClient</string> <string name="register_title">Create Account</string> <string name="register_subtitle">Set up your client profile</string> <string name="full_name">Full Name</string> <string name="full_name_placeholder">Your full name</string> <string name="email">Email</string> <string name="email_placeholder">your@email.com</string> <string name="password">Password</string> <string name="password_placeholder">Min. 8 characters</string> <string name="confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="register_button">Register</string> <string name="already_have_account">Already have an account? option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">SISPTMClient</string> <string name="register_title">Crear cuenta</string> <string name="register_subtitle">Configura tu perfil de cliente</string> <string name="full_name">Nombre Completo</string> <string name="full_name_placeholder">Tu nombre completo</string> <string name="email">Correo Electrónico</string> <string name="email_placeholder">tu@correo.com</string> <string name="password">Contraseña</string> <string name="password_placeholder">Mín. 8 caracteres</string> <string name="confirm_password">Confirmar Contraseña</string> <string name="register_button">Registrarse</string> <string name="already_have_account">¿Ya tienes una cuenta?
